title: dnf bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[4.20.0-18.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- Fixed python stack trace with updateinfo list cves command [Orabug: 32749660]
- Replaced upstream bugzilla reporting reference. [Orabug: 32829849]

[4.20.0-18]
- Fix detecting releasever_minor in dnf-automatic (RHEL-106141)

[4.20.0-17]
- Add deprecation warning to modularity commands/docs (RHEL-89940)

[4.20.0-16]
- Obsolete RHEL-9-only multisig DNF plugin (RHEL-102336)

[4.20.0-15]
- Mark transient transactions in DNF history (RHEL-84515)
- Warn/disallow changes outside /usr, /etc with --transient (RHEL-84501)
full_text:
[4.20.0-18.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- Fixed python stack trace with updateinfo list cves command [Orabug: 32749660]
- Replaced upstream bugzilla reporting reference. [Orabug: 32829849]

[4.20.0-18]
- Fix detecting releasever_minor in dnf-automatic (RHEL-106141)

[4.20.0-17]
- Add deprecation warning to modularity commands/docs (RHEL-89940)

[4.20.0-16]
- Obsolete RHEL-9-only multisig DNF plugin (RHEL-102336)

[4.20.0-15]
- Mark transient transactions in DNF history (RHEL-84515)
- Warn/disallow changes outside /usr, /etc with --transient (RHEL-84501)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20106-0.html
